Hero.description: A straightforward schedule and task manager. Built to help you organize lessons, track breaks, and manage daily tasks without unnecessary complexity.

Features.title: Core Functionality
Features.description: Practical tools for everyday planning, focused on stability and ease of use.

speed.title: Offline Mode
speed.description: The application works without an internet connection. Your schedule is cached locally on your device.

security.title: Local Storage
security.description: All data is stored locally by default. Account creation is completely optional.

sync.title: Optional Sync
sync.description: Sign in with Google to synchronize your schedule and settings across multiple devices.

analytics.title: Open Source
analytics.description: The project is open-source. You can review the code on GitHub and host it yourself.

customization.title: Visual Customization
customization.description: Assign distinct colors to different subjects for faster visual identification in your calendar.

sync.title: Conflict Resolution
sync.description: When syncing across multiple devices, the application automatically handles schedule conflicts to prevent data loss.

sharing.title: Schedule Sharing
sharing.description: Generate a unique access link to share your complete schedule with classmates or colleagues.

widgets.title: System Widgets
widgets.description: Native home screen widgets for Android and iOS devices to view your upcoming lessons instantly.

ios.title: iOS / iPhone
ios.description: Full support for native widgets, lock screen complications, and real-time schedule updates.

android.title: Android
android.description: Optimized performance, Material You design, and native home screen widgets.

web.title: Web Application
web.description: Instant access from any desktop or mobile browser. No installation required.

step1.title: Create a Schedule
step1.description: Add your lessons, configure the time slots, and assign colors to each subject.

step2.title: Share (Optional)
step2.description: Send your configured schedule to other users using a direct import link.

step3.title: Sync (Optional)
step3.description: Log in with your account to save a backup to the cloud and access it from any device.

CTA.title: Try PlanIt
CTA.description: Available directly in your browser as a Web App, or as a downloadable mobile application.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1Content: PlanIt stores your data locally on your device by default. If you choose to use the cloud synchronization feature, your schedule data is stored securely in our database.
Privacy.section2Content: Authentication is handled via third-party providers (e.g., Google). We do not store or process your passwords.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1Content: PlanIt is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time.
Terms.section2Content: The source code is available under an open-source license. Please refer to the repository for specific licensing details.

home.title: PlanIt | Schedule Manager
home.description: A straightforward schedule and task manager for students and teachers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | PlanIt
privacy.description: Privacy policy and data handling guidelines.

terms.title: Terms of Service | PlanIt
terms.description: Terms of service and usage rules.
